description: Configure the core auditing infrastructure in ADAudit Plus (https://localhost:8081) by adding a new Domain Controller. Use the application credentials admin/admin. The domain configuration details are: Domain Name 'corp.acmefinancial.com', Domain Controller Name 'DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com', Protocol 'LDAP', Port '389', Username 'administrator@corp.acmefinancial.com', and Password 'AcmeAudit2024!'. Connection validation failure is expected in this environment. Upon saving the configuration, create a text file at C:\workspace\domain_config_result.txt containing the text: 'Domain configured: corp.acmefinancial.com - DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com'.
